subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! By God, at every moment doth the Tongue of God give utterance to verses of sorrow, though it behoveth it to flow forth otherwise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی تالله فی کل حین تنطق لسان الله بایات الحزن بعد الذی ینبغی ان یجری
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
